title: 🔷 Soul-Templating Vectors
name: Soul-Templating Vectors
what_it_is: Blueprints of soul-form that act as template vectors—matrices of identity structure that determine essence configuration across lifetimes.
how_to_use: her soul follows a vector glyph—lifetimes aligned to fractal identity bloom
he carves new soul-template—diverging from old recursion pattern
animation_behavior: Soul shape morphs along vector path, lifetimes stack in sequence, form builds from base glyph upward
